presets.name: testing/render-simulator-bash
presets.title: Render Simulator (Bash)
presets.description: A no-op render that sleeps per frame. Runs a bash script; use on Linux/macOS or any worker with a bash shell.

presets.name: testing/render-simulator-powershell
presets.title: Render Simulator (PowerShell)
presets.description: A no-op render that sleeps per frame. Runs a PowerShell script; for Windows workers without a bash shell.
